src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Updated permitted URL patterns to match OpenAPI 3.0 (Swagger 3) endpoints instead of Swagger 2.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed antMatchers to include '/v3/api-docs/**' and '/swagger-ui/**' instead of '/v2/api-docs' and '/swagger-resources/**'.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Removed imports for classes no longer used after the security configuration refactoring.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Removed imports for UserDetailsServiceImpl, AuthenticationManagerBuilder, WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, BCryptPasswordEncoder, and Autowired.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Added formatter off/on comments to preserve the fluent API style of the HttpSecurity builder.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Added //@formatter:off and //@formatter:on around the http.cors()...build() chain.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Switch configuration property binding from manual `@Value` injections to Spring Boot's `@ConfigurationProperties` for cleaner code.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Added `@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = "swagger")` and `@Getter`/`@Setter` annotations, removing individual `@Value` annotations and `@PropertySource`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rename field `licence` to `appLicense` to align with standard naming conventions and new property binding.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed private field `private String licence;` to `private String appLicense;`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rename field `licenceUrl` to `appLicenseUrl` to align with standard naming conventions and new property binding.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed private field `private String licenceUrl;` to `private String appLicenseUrl;`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rename field `contactEmail` to `contactMail` to match the expected property key or internal naming preference.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed private field `private String contactEmail;` to `private String contactMail;`.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Remove the legacy method for adding global header parameters as this is now handled by the security scheme definition.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Deleted the `getHeaderParams()` method and its usage in the `api()` bean definition.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Added the 'final' keyword to a local variable declaration to enforce immutability.
Corrected missing whitespace after a comma in a method argument list for better readability.
Replaced hardcoded security constants with a dedicated properties class to support configuration-driven settings.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Removed static import of SecurityConstants and injected JwtProperties via @RequiredArgsConstructor to access issuer, secret, and expiration.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Remove leading whitespace in SLF4J log format string to ensure correct parameter substitution and cleaner output.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.human_impl: Changed log.info(" {} has successfully logged in!", ...) to log.info("{} has successfully logged in!", ...)

pom.xml.general_idea: Increment project version to 2.0.0 to reflect the major migration.
Update project description to reflect the new Spring Boot version.
Upgrade MapStruct to 1.5.2.Final for better Java 11 compatibility and features.
Define version property for the new OpenAPI Swagger library.
Remove property for the deprecated Springfox Swagger library.
Remove explicit Maven plugin version property, likely relying on parent or defaults.
Remove explicit Lombok version to inherit it from the Spring Boot parent BOM.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update Docker Compose file version to 3.8 to align with newer Docker Compose specifications.
Quote the port mapping string to prevent YAML interpretation issues and adhere to stricter syntax standards.
